nasb.text: Moreover, he made the veil of blue and purple and scarlet material, and fine twisted linen; he made it with cherubim, the work of a skillful workman.

esv.text: He made the veil of blue and purple and scarlet yarns and fine twined linen; with cherubim skillfully worked into it he made it.

cnv.text: 他用藍色紫色朱紅色線和撚的細麻做了一幅幔幕，用巧設的圖案手工繡上基路伯。

ccb.text: 他用细麻线和蓝色、紫色、朱红色的线织成一幅幔子，精工绣上基路伯天使，
